daily_specials.name: Samosa Platter
daily_specials.description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes & peas. Served with mint & tamarind chutneys.

daily_specials.name: Seekh Kebab
daily_specials.description: Minced lamb & beef with aromatic herbs, char-grilled on iron skewers.

daily_specials.name: Paneer Tikka
daily_specials.description: Cottage cheese marinated in spiced yogurt, charred in the tandoor.

daily_specials.name: Chicken Biryani
daily_specials.description: Fragrant basmati rice with tender chicken, saffron & whole spices.

daily_specials.name: Butter Chicken
daily_specials.description: Succulent chicken in a velvety tomato-cream sauce.

daily_specials.name: Lamb Karahi
daily_specials.description: Slow-cooked lamb with tomatoes, ginger & green chillies in karahi.

daily_specials.name: Mango Lassi
daily_specials.description: Chilled yogurt blended with fresh mangoes, cardamom & rose.

daily_specials.name: Gulab Jamun
daily_specials.description: Milk-solid dumplings in rose & cardamom sugar syrup. Served warm.
